Public Health Evidence Portal
Home State Health State SES Regions County Health County SES Neighbors Countries Country Metadata Names Methodology

Methodology

The portal is synthetic but shaped like public health evidence sources used in state, county, and country audits.

Generation

All CSV files are generated with fixed seed 20260707. Values combine geographic profiles, year trends, and random noise.

State Tables

State data include 50 states, DC, and territory distractors. Health measures are long-format with mixed demographic strata and survey sample sizes where relevant.

County Tables

County data include hundreds of counties across diverse states, RUCC codes, economic typology, missing joins, invalid FIPS rows, and old-name records.

Country Tables

Country data cover 2015-2024 and include WHO-like indicators, World Bank-like metadata, name variants, missingness, and scale anomalies.

Static Web portal. CSV downloads are served directly from /data/.
